title: The Country That Continues Reading

features.name: reading marks everywhere
features.desc-on-touch: The landscape has become text. Every fold of earth, every branch, every water line is a mark the country has made while learning to read itself. You see your own footsteps appear in the reading.

features.name: the landscape s continuous utterance
features.desc-on-touch: A stack of terrain forming words. The words shift as you listen. The country is still composing its speech, and you are standing inside the sentence.

features.name: pages written in soil
features.desc-on-touch: You touch earth that holds text—planting records, water maps, animal trails. They are a reading the country has always been composing, literate in its own tongue.

features.name: the infinite margin
features.desc-on-touch: Where the reading meets silence, but the silence is not empty—it is the country pausing, gathering words for what comes next.

features.name: trace of continuous learning
features.desc-on-touch: A wireframe structure shows how reading and landscape have become the same thing—neither preceding the other, both learning to be in time together.

inscription: here reading becomes landscape becomes reading, infinite circulation

file.name: Country_Utterance_Continuous_Growth.txt
file.note: an endless text the country is composing by becoming itself, reading as it grows

exits.label: back to the horizon where reading had only just begun
toward pages no one has learned to hold
deeper into the sentence that has no ending
